title: Product Placement in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Product Placement in Rebuild             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Sep 28, 2009 7:38 pm In 1.0 there was product placement in the form of that canned coffee and the Doritos in Misatos fridge thing. In 2.0 I noticed the canned coffee again, but were there more anyone else caught?

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:12 pm I think I saw a Pepsi logo stuck on Sachiel as he plummeted to earth

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:14 pm I think Shinji's sneakers and the coffee.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:18 pm Was Shinji's the Nike? Because I remember seeing a pair when the song "Yamashita". I memorized the CD before I saw the movie... lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:23 pm Yeah. I was thinkin' Nike. Remember how in NGE it was like Converse?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:38 pm Just checked it. The Nike is just some random woman's shoes.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:56 pm Some more product placement stuff. Not mine just in case you ask about the Spanish subtitles. Has anyone here had that UCC coffee?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:04 am Yeah. It's cold coffee with milk and some kind of sweetener (light). It's actually not bad. Japan is really big into canned products, stuff much weirder than coffee, but there's a lot of canned coffee. In Nagoya, UCC is harder to get because you need to go to a Lawsons or a few other specific places, whereas the BOSS brand can be found in a vending machine just about anywhere. There's also Pizza Hut boxes somewhere, and the convenient store they go to is Lawson's, Yebisu and Kirin beer in Misato's fridge, essentially the people who payed for the film. In 2.0 there's those DoCoMo phones.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 5:00 am Frito's is the least expected.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:21 pm Why do I want pizza now? I like that they put that in there, product placement is fun!

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:29 pm I think the coffee might have been shown in NGE to, but I'm not sure. I also think I see the backs of two Slim Jims in Sammaeloo's "Donde" pic.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Tue Sep 29, 2009 2:53 pm What I remember seeing is Maya wearing New Balance shoes. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 9:11 pm I hope in 3.0 they stop the movie mid scene and give a full out Pizza Hut stuffed crust commercial then nonchalantly segway back into the film

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Sep 29, 2009 9:36 pm Dont forget the billboard that advertises for Doritos seen in the background when Sachiel attacks the city. This scene in the film can be seen when that jet attack plane almost slams into Shinji near the beginning of the film. Pay attention to the background in the far distance and you'll see it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 29, 2009 9:48 pm ^Doritos got really heavy promotion during 1.0, the most blatant is when Shinji goes through Misato's fridge thing. Also consider that there was a line of Evangelion Doritos. WATCH EVA, BUY DORITOS, WATCH EVA, BUY DORITOS, WATCH EVA, BUY DORITOS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Sep 30, 2009 12:49 am Meh. thats nothing. Its the more subtle ad placements that i'm worried about.

[]:             Quote Post by purplepolecat » Thu Oct 01, 2009 11:39 am Who the hell keeps Doritos in the fridge ? It's wasting valuable beer space !

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Oct 01, 2009 12:56 pm The day we see Mari or Asuka with a Louis Vuitton (sp?) and a Cartier diamond incrusted watch, bricks will be shat.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Thu Oct 01, 2009 3:14 pm UCC obviously likes to sponsor Anno cause in one scene of Shiki-Jitsu you see a can of it sitting on a desk and also wasn't there ad of Eva and UCC before RoE?

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Thu Oct 01, 2009 3:29 pm Product placement make things so realistic.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Mon Sep 28, 2009 10:12 pm I think I saw a Pepsi logo
